risks.risk: Ephemeris or ayanamsha mismatch may shift tithi/nakshatra timing.
risks.mitigation: Trace all longitude and ayanamsha inputs; compare against reviewed references.

risks.risk: Location/sunrise basis may change observance date.
risks.mitigation: Keep regional variation visible and require location-specific sunrise basis.

risks.risk: Seed foundation is not full production corpus.
risks.mitigation: Use only non-public dry-run planning until seed expansion and validation.

risks.risk: Public interpretation may appear deterministic or predictive.
risks.mitigation: Keep public output blocked and non-claim safety boundary active.
